description: Classifies an I/H steel cross-section (Classes 1-4) per EC3 Table 5.2 width-to-thickness limits, with correct bending vs compression web limits.

stress_type.description: Dominant stress: 'bending' for beams (web limits 72/83/124 epsilon), 'compression' for columns (33/38/42 epsilon).

r_mm.description: Root fillet radius in mm (for rolled sections, deducted from c)

thickness_mm.description: Governing element thickness for fy lookup when t > 40 mm

constraints: If geometry missing, section_name must map to built-in library.

description: Computes simplified axial, bending, and shear design resistances from section properties and steel grade.
constraints: Class 1-2 uses plastic modulus; Class 3-4 uses elastic.

description: Runs a simplified linear axial+bending interaction check and returns utilization.
constraints: All resistance and action inputs must be positive.

description: Computes EC3-style cross-section moment resistance for IPE sections.
constraints: section_name must be an IPE section.
Class 1-2 uses Wpl; Class 3-4 uses Wel.

description: Calculates bending moment, shear force, reactions and deflection for a simply supported beam under point load or UDL.

I_cm4.description: Second moment of area for deflection

constraints: Point load position must not exceed span.

description: Calculates moment, shear, reaction and deflection for a cantilever beam under point load at tip or UDL.
Looks up yield strength fy, ultimate strength fu, and ε factor for a steel grade per EC3 Table 3.1. Accounts for thickness reduction.
constraints: Grades S235, S275, S355, S420, S460 supported.

description: Determines the effective buckling length factor k and effective length Lcr for a member based on end restraint conditions.
Computes flexural buckling resistance Nb,Rd of a compression member per EC3 6.3.1, with axis-aware I selection and Table 6.2 buckling curve auto-selection.

thickness_mm.description: Governing element thickness for fy lookup when t > 40 mm

buckling_axis.description: Buckling axis: 'y' for strong-axis, 'z' for weak-axis. Controls which I is used from library.

buckling_curve.description: EC3 buckling curve. If omitted, auto-selected from Table 6.2 based on section geometry and axis.

fabrication.description: Fabrication method for Table 6.2 buckling curve selection.

constraints: Requires section geometry (from library or manual input).
Uses EC3 buckling curves per Table 6.2.

description: Calculates design shear resistance of bolts per EC3-1-8 Table 3.4. Supports common bolt classes and diameters.
constraints: Shear resistance only; bearing should be checked separately.

description: Calculates design resistance of a fillet weld per EC3-1-8 simplified method (clause 4.5.3.3).
constraints: Simplified method only; directional method may give higher resistance.

description: Checks serviceability deflection against standard span/deflection limit ratios per EC0 Annex A1.
constraints: L/250 for total deflection, L/300 for variable actions per EC0 Table A1.4.

description: Converts between common structural engineering units: length (mm/cm/m/in/ft), force (N/kN/MN), moment (Nm/kNm), stress (Pa/kPa/MPa/GPa/psi), area, and section modulus.
constraints: Both units must be in the same physical dimension.

description: Computes tension resistance Nt,Rd per EC3 §6.2.3: plastic (gross), ultimate (net), and net-section yielding (Category C).
constraints: A_net_cm2 needed for net section checks.

description: Checks general yield criterion (Von Mises) per EC3 §6.2.1(5) for combined longitudinal, transverse stress and shear.
Computes torsion resistance and combined shear-torsion interaction per EC3 §6.2.7 for open and hollow sections.

t_min_mm.description: Min wall thickness for hollow sections

W_T_cm3.description: Torsional section modulus for open sections

constraints: Hollow sections need A_k_cm2 and t_min_mm.

description: Checks bending-shear interaction per EC3 §6.2.8. Reduces moment resistance when V_Ed > 0.5·V_pl,Rd.
Computes reduced moment resistance M_N,Rd for Class 1/2 cross-sections under combined bending and axial force per EC3 §6.2.9.1. Supports I/H, rectangular, and circular sections with biaxial bending.
constraints: I/H sections use flange/web area ratio parameter 'a'.

description: Checks combined bending, shear, and axial force per EC3 §6.2.10. Uses ρ-reduction when shear exceeds 50% of V_pl,Rd.
Computes lateral torsional buckling resistance Mb,Rd per EC3 §6.3.2. Supports general case (§6.3.2.2) and rolled/welded method (§6.3.2.3). Calculates χ_LT, M_cr, and λ̄_LT.

M_cr_kNm.description: Elastic critical moment (or calculated from section props)

constraints: Provide M_cr directly or L_cr + section properties for calculation.
Uses EC3 Table 6.3/6.4 for LTB curves.

description: Checks combined bending and axial compression per EC3 §6.3.3 (Equations 6.61 and 6.62). Requires pre-computed χ_y, χ_z, χ_LT, and interaction factors k_ij.
constraints: Interaction factors k_ij from Annex A (Method 1) or Annex B (Method 2).

description: Computes torsional or torsional-flexural buckling resistance per EC3 §6.3.1.4. Calculates N_cr,T, λ̄_T, and χ using appropriate buckling curve.
constraints: Provide N_cr_T_kN or N_cr_TF_kN directly, or section properties for calculation.

description: Calculates critical load factor α_cr per EC3 §5.2.1 to check if second-order effects need to be considered. Includes portal frame approximation and sway amplification factor.
constraints: Portal frame method needs H_Ed, V_Ed, h, δ_H.

description: Calculates global sway imperfection φ for frames per EC3 §5.3.2, including α_h and α_m reduction factors. Optionally computes equivalent horizontal forces.

N_Ed_total_kN.description: Total vertical load per storey for equiv forces

description: Calculates bracing system imperfection and equivalent stabilising force per EC3 §5.3.3. Computes e_0, q_d, and total Q.

L_m.description: Span of bracing system in m

constraints: q_d includes second-order effects via δ_q.

description: Analyses built-up compression members (laced or battened) per EC3 §6.4. Computes overall buckling resistance, chord forces, and shear stiffness.
constraints: Laced requires S_v_kN or diagonal geometry.

description: Calculates stable lengths between restraints per EC3 Annex BB.3 for elastic segments and members with plastic hinges. Supports lateral and torsional restraint methods.
Computes effective slenderness for angle web members in trusses per EC3 Annex BB.1.2, with modified slenderness and buckling resistance.
Calculates net cross-section area after bolt hole deductions per EC3 §6.2.2.2. Supports non-staggered and staggered bolt patterns with multiple failure paths.
Computes Method 2 interaction factors k_yy, k_yz, k_zy, k_zz per Annex B Tables B.1/B.2 for use in §6.3.3 combined buckling checks.
constraints: chi_y, chi_z must be between 0 and 1.

description: Determines equivalent uniform moment factor C_m from Table B.3 for Annex B Method 2 interaction checks.
Computes Method 1 interaction factors k_yy, k_yz, k_zy, k_zz per Annex A Tables A.1/A.2 for §6.3.3 combined buckling checks.
Determines cross-section class (1-4) for a compression part based on Table 5.2 c/t limits for internal parts, outstand flanges, and angles.
constraints: c and t must be positive.

description: Simplified LTB assessment for beams with discrete lateral restraints per §6.3.2.4, checking compression flange slenderness against stability limit.
constraints: L_c, i_fz, M_y_Ed, W_y must be positive.

description: Computes the modification factor C_m for linear moment gradients per BB.3.3.1, including N_crE, N_crT, and B-coefficients.
Determines buckling length L_cr for hollow section chord and brace members in trusses per BB.1.3.
Checks continuous lateral (BB.2.1) or torsional (BB.2.2) restraint adequacy from sheeting or stabilizing elements.
constraints: check_type determines which fields are required.

description: Computes the taper factor c for non-uniform members (tapered or haunched) per BB.3.3.3.
Checks closely spaced built-up compression members per §6.4.4, including interconnection spacing limits and integral buckling resistance.
constraints: Spacing limits: 15·i_min for packing plates, 70·i_min for star battened.

description: Computes the additional moment ΔM_Ed = N_Ed·e_N for Class 4 cross-sections with shifted effective centroid per §6.2.2.5.
Computes initial bow imperfection e_0 from Table 5.1 for second-order analysis of compression members per §5.3.4.
Computes restraint forces at rotated plastic hinge locations per §6.3.5.2: local 2.5% force and bracing system force Q_m.
constraints: m_members required when check_bracing is true.
